lexical_suggestions.query: The mother dead these fourteen years did incubate in her own bosom the creature who would carry her off
lexical_suggestions.greek: τερατοσκόπος, ὀπὸς, τοὺς νεκρούς. ἔστιν γὰρ βδέλυγμα

lexical_suggestions.greek: τὰ δὲ ὑπολειπόμενα ἔδεται τὰ ἄγρια θηρία.

lexical_suggestions.query: He can neither read nor write and in him broods already a taste for mindless violence
